title: 允许 Claude 说「我不知道」来减少幻觉
title_en: Allow Claude to Say 'I Don't Know' to Reduce Hallucinations

body.goal: 减少 Claude 编造信息的概率
steps: 在 system prompt 中明确告诉 Claude：如果不确定答案，可以说「我不知道」或「我不确定」
例如加一句：'If you are not confident in your answer, say so rather than guessing'
原理：Claude 默认会尽量回答所有问题，即使没有足够依据。给它「退出通道」后，它会在不确定时选择诚实而非编造
在高风险场景（金融分析、法律、医疗）中，这一步尤为关键——一个错误的回答比不回答危害大得多

body_en.goal: Reduce the probability of Claude fabricating information
steps: Explicitly tell Claude in the system prompt that it can say 'I don't know' or 'I'm not sure' when uncertain
Example: add 'If you are not confident in your answer, say so rather than guessing'
Why it works: Claude defaults to answering every question, even without sufficient evidence. Giving it an 'exit ramp' lets it choose honesty over fabrication
This is especially critical in high-stakes domains (finance, legal, medical) — a wrong answer is far worse than no answer
